replies.msg:
恒地收皮啦
希望快撚啲全公司中晒

CLS

簡直係大範圍爆發

啟勝指，該名職員自7月15日起已沒有返回形薈工作。平日的工作毋須與住客接觸， 近日也沒有與服務處職員有密切接觸 。根據服務處紀錄，該名職員一直遵照公司指引，工作期間佩戴口罩。啟勝指已安排相關員工進行病毒測試；而有接觸的職員則會暫時休假等候測試結果。

啟勝強調，形薈服務處今天早上已完成徹底清潔消毒屋苑公眾地方及設施，以及服務處辦事處，並已發出通告通知住戶。為了加強保障屋苑所有業戶的健康安全，服務處已安排由今晚開始，每晚凌晨於大堂及升降機進行噴霧消毒。

啟勝重申會密切留意事態發展，務求作出相應準備，保障旗下物業的公共衛生安全。

樓主俾高層屌


Dear All,

As an employer, it is our duty to provide a safe and hygienic place for our staff to work. We need to stay alert on the news of COVID-19, in particular on suspected and confirmed cases happening around. If there is any staff case in your team/department comes to your knowledge, please report it to human resources the SOONEST so that we could take timely actions in:
1. informing our staff without letting rumour or unfounded news spreading
2. working with the management office to arrange cleaning and sanitizing concerned office area and public space
3. offering support and care to staff and families with special needs

Kindly note the cases I referred to above include staff from our subsidiaries or outside guests come to Sun Hung Kai Centre for work, meeting or other business reasons.

With timely and joint efforts made by us in keeping our staff adequately informed about the coronavirus situations at the workplace, we shall be able to alleviate some of their concerns and worries.

Thank you for your attention and support to this important subject.

Regards,
C H Tang
